name: agent-plugin-bar
description: Drop-in agent plugin system for app and web teams.

scripts.build: npm --prefix packages/agent-runtime run build && npm --prefix packages/react-widget run build && npm --prefix apps/demo-app run build
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix packages/agent-runtime install --no-package-lock && npm --prefix packages/react-widget install --no-package-lock && npm --prefix apps/demo-app install --no-package-lock
